details: The "Annual Medical Assistance Scheme" by the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board, Labour Resources Department, Government of Bihar, provides a yearly financial assistance of ₹3,000/- to the construction workers who are registered with the Board.
eligibility: The applicant should be a worker.
The worker should be engaged in building or construction work.
The worker should be registered with the "Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board".
The worker's membership with the Welfare Board must be active at the time of application.
The worker should have at least one year of membership with the Board.

On the next page, provide your details including your Aadhaar Number. Then click "Authenticate".
An online form will appear. In the form, fill in all the mandatory fields. The fields marked with an asterisk (*) are mandatory.
Click "Submit". Proceed to pay the application fee online.
Upon successful payment, you will receive your construction worker registration number.

Click on "Submit Application" to complete the process.

documents_required: Identity Proof i.e. Aadhaar Card, Voter Card
Identity Card of the Registered Worker

faqs.question: What type of work should the applicant be engaged in to qualify for the financial assistance scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant should be engaged in building or construction work to be eligible for the financial assistance.

faqs.question: Is it mandatory for the applicant to be registered with the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant must be registered with the Bihar Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board to qualify for the scheme.

faqs.question: How long should the applicant’s membership with the Welfare Board be active to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant’s membership with the Welfare Board must be active for at least one year at the time of application.

faqs.question: What is the annual financial assistance provided under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides an annual financial assistance of ₹3,000/- to eligible construction workers.

faqs.question: Can applicants track the status of their application online?
faqs.answer: Yes, applicants can track their application status online by providing their registration number on the official website.

faqs.question: Are bank account details required for the application process?
faqs.answer: Yes, the applicant must provide their bank account details as part of the application process.

faqs.question: Can the applicant apply for the scheme without an Aadhaar card?
faqs.answer: No, the applicant must provide their Aadhaar number during the registration process to authenticate their identity.

faqs.question: How do I know which fields are mandatory when filling out the online registration form for construction workers?
faqs.answer: In the online registration form, all fields marked with an asterisk (*) symbol are mandatory and must be filled out. Make sure to complete all these required fields before proceeding.

faqs.question: What essential documents should I keep ready before starting my application process?
faqs.answer: You should have your Aadhaar Card or Voter Card for identity proof, bank account details, proof of age, registered worker identity card, proof of membership, and any other specifically requested documents.

faqs.question: How can I monitor the progress of my medical assistance application after submission?
faqs.answer: You can track your application status at any time by visiting the official website of the Board and entering your registration number in the application tracking system.
